item.text: I’ll review the uncommitted diff against the surrounding session-filtering, foreground/background task, and fallback behavior. I’ll use read-only inspection and static syntax/diff checks only—no test suite.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git diff --check && git diff -- plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs tests/runtime.test.mjs && rg -n \"getCurrentSessionId|filterJobsForCurrentSession|resolveLatestTrackedTaskThread|handleTaskResumeCandidate|SESSION_ID_ENV\" plugins/codex/scripts tests -g '*.mjs'"

/bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git diff --check && git diff -- plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs tests/runtime.test.mjs && rg -n \"getCurrentSessionId|filterJobsForCurrentSession|resolveLatestTrackedTaskThread|handleTaskResumeCandidate|SESSION_ID_ENV\" plugins/codex/scripts tests -g '*.mjs'"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '280,340p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '420,465p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '520,650p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '700,825p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '1,80p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && sed -n '200,275p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && sed -n '45,85p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs && node --check plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && node --check plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && node --check tests/runtime.test.mjs"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '280,340p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '420,465p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '520,650p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '700,825p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '1,80p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && sed -n '200,275p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && sed -n '45,85p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs && node --check plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && node --check plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && node --check tests/runtime.test.mjs"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,130p' plugins/codex/scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs && sed -n '1,120p' plugins/codex/commands/rescue.md && sed -n '1,110p' plugins/codex/skills/codex-cli-runtime/SKILL.md && sed -n '130,185p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/state.mjs && sed -n '100,175p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs && git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs | sed -n '300,332p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,130p' plugins/codex/scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs && sed -n '1,120p' plugins/codex/commands/rescue.md && sed -n '1,110p' plugins/codex/skills/codex-cli-runtime/SKILL.md && sed -n '130,185p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/state.mjs && sed -n '100,175p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs && git show HEAD:plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs | sed -n '300,332p'"
